productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men's Bold Stripe Grey T-shirt
description: Composition:100% polo t-shirt in thick purple and grey stripes Wash care:Machine wash separately in cold water. Use mild detergent. Do not bleach. Avoid soaking. Remove promptly. Line dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do not iron directly on print/embroidery.Fitting:Slim FitIn a mood to scream out with joy, energy and zest? Here's the apt tee to suit your mood from classic polo. The thick purple and grey stripes with a bold graphic print on the front is bursting with life. Team it up with casual lowers for an outing with friends and to college.Model statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-18"
